modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: USB device fails to work when connected to monitor

full_description_text:  
I tried plugging my USB device into the monitor, but it just doesn't seem to work. It's really frustrating because I need it for my tasks. Not sure if it's a compatibility issue or something else, but I could use some help figuring this out.
short_description: USB device fails to work when connected to monitor
description: I tried plugging my USB device into the monitor, but it just doesn't seem to work. It's really frustrating because I need it for my tasks. Not sure if it's a compatibility issue or something else, but I could use some help figuring this out.
